stages.concept:
# Unit 064: to부정사의 부사적 용법 (목적, 감정의 원인) - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **to부정사의 부사적 용법** 중 **목적**과 **감정의 원인**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **목적** — ~하기 위해

> I went to the library **to study**.
> 나는 공부하기 위해 도서관에 갔다.

> She saved money **to buy** a new phone.
> 그녀는 새 핸드폰을 사기 위해 돈을 모았다.

> He studied hard **to pass** the exam.
> 그는 시험에 통과하기 위해 열심히 공부했다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **in order to**로 바꿔 쓸 수도 있어요.

> I went to the library **in order to** study.
> = I went to the library **to** study.

**Q. 다음 문장에서 쓰인 to부정사의 용법과 뜻을 알맞게 고르세요.**
"I am happy to see you."
1. 목적 (~하기 위해)
2. 감정의 원인 (~해서) ✅
3. 명사 꾸미기 (~할)

👩‍🏫 선생님: **감정의 원인** — ~해서 (기쁘다, 슬프다, 놀랐다 등의 원인)

> I am happy **to see** you.
> 나는 너를 만나서 기쁘다.

> She was sad **to hear** the news.
> 그녀는 그 소식을 듣고 슬펐다.

> We were surprised **to find** the door open.
> 우리는 문이 열려 있는 것을 발견해서 놀랐다.

> I was glad **to receive** your letter.
> 나는 네 편지를 받아서 기뻤다.

🧑‍🎓 학생: 목적(~하기 위해)과 감정의 원인(~해서)! to부정사가 부사처럼 동사나 형용사를 꾸며주는 거군요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 064: to부정사의 부사적 용법 목적, 감정의 원인 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 밑줄 친 부분의 쓰임에 해당하는 것을 고르시오.
I exercise to stay healthy. (     )
> **정답** 목적

---

**02.** She was happy to hear the news.
> **정답** 감정의 원인

---

**03.** He went to the store to buy milk.
> **정답** 목적

---

**04.** I was surprised to see him there.
> **정답** 감정의 원인

---

**05.** They studied hard to pass the exam.
> **정답** 목적

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
She went to the library for study.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** for study → to study

---

**07.** I was glad hearing the news.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** hearing → to hear

---

**08.** He ran fast for catching the bus.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** for catching → to catch

---

**09.** We were shocked seeing the result.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** seeing → to see

---

**10.** She saved money for buying a guitar.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** for buying → to buy

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
나는 건강을 유지하기 위해 운동한다.
I exercise healthy.
> **정답** to stay

---

**12.** 그녀는 그 소식을 듣고 기뻤다.
She was glad the news.
> **정답** to hear

---

**13.** 그는 우유를 사러 가게에 갔다.
He went to the store milk.
> **정답** to buy

---

**14.** 나는 그를 거기서 만나서 놀랐다.
I was surprised him there.
> **정답** to meet (to see)

---

**15.** 그들은 시험에 합격하기 위해 열심히 공부했다.
They studied hard the exam.
> **정답** to pass

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
그녀는 영어를 배우기 위해 도서관에 갔다.
She went to to the library learn English
> **정답** She / went / to / the / library / to / learn / English

---

**17.** 나는 그 선물을 받아서 행복했다.
I was happy to receive the gift
> **정답** I / was / happy / to / receive / the / gift

---

**18.** 그는 돈을 모으기 위해 일한다.
He to works save money
> **정답** He / works / to / save / money

---

**19.** 우리는 그 결과를 보고 슬펐다.
were sad We to see the result
> **정답** We / were / sad / to / see / the / result

---

**20.** 그녀는 케이크를 만들기 위해 재료를 샀다.
She bought to ingredients make a cake
> **정답** She / bought / ingredients / to / make / a / cake
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 064: to부정사의 부사적 용법 목적, 감정의 원인 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 말을 고르시오.
Tom ran to the airport ______________ Amy.
When they met each other, he felt pleased
___________________ her.
to see
to seeing
see
seeing
> **정답** to see

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
She goes to a market ______________ some eggs.
But she was so sad ______________ the market
closed.
buying - seeing
to buy - seeing
to buy - to see
buy - see
> **정답** to buy - to see

---

**03.** 다음 보기의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
<보기> Amy looked up the dictionary to find the
meanings.
I'm planning to invite Tom to lunch.
Their task was to train new workers for a
week.
Tom had some secrets to hide from his
friends.
Please leave the house early to arrive there in
time.
> **정답** Please leave the house early to arrive there in time.

---

**04.** 다음 보기의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
<보기> Tom felt upset to get a bad grade for math
exam.
To stay healthy, Amy regularly goes jogging.
We went to the park to take a walk.
I attended the meeting to discuss yearly plan.
Jake was sorry to hear the bad news.
• upset 속상한, 마음이 상한
> **정답** Jake was sorry to hear the bad news.

---

**05.** 다음 보기의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
<보기> Amy is leaving for America to learn English.
The girl asked for some water to drink.
Tom went to the grocery store to buy milk
and eggs.
Jake wants to learn Spanish.
They need to go to church every Sunday.
> **정답** Tom went to the grocery store to buy milk and eggs.

---

**06.** 다음 보기의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
<보기> Tom was so glad to be on the team.
Amy and Tom are pleased to have a new
puppy, Bori.
I should buy a new notebook to write on.
His plan is to read ten science books a month.
They worked late last night to finish their
project.
> **정답** Amy and Tom are pleased to have a new puppy,
Bori.

---

**07.** 다음 <보기>와 같은 뜻의 문장을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
<보기> Amy surfed the Internet to find some
information.
Amy surfed the Internet so as to find some
information.
Amy surfed the Internet of finding some
information.
Amy surfed the Internet by finding some
information.
Amy surfed the Internet in order to find some
information.
• surf 인터넷을 서핑[검색]하다
> **정답** Amy surfed the Internet so as to find some
information., Amy surfed the Internet in order to
find some information.

---

**08.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
나의 할아버지는 걷기 위해 지팡이가 필요하다.
My grandfather needs a cane to walk.
My grandfather needs a cane to walk with
My grandfather needs a cane walking.
My grandfather needs a cane to walking.
> **정답** My grandfather needs a cane to walk with

---

**09.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
캐나다 사람은 자신의 나라로 돌아 갈 수 있어서 기뻤다.
The Canadian was pleased is able to go back
to her country.
The Canadian was pleased can go back to her
country.
The Canadian was pleased to be able to go
back to her country.
The Canadian was pleased to being able to go
back to her country.
> **정답** The Canadian was pleased to be able to go back to
her country.

---

**10.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오.
[2개]
세종대왕은 한글을 창조하기 위해 많은 노력을 기울이셨다.
King Sejong made a lot of effort so as to
create Hanguel.
King Sejong made a lot of effort in order
creating Hanguel.
King Sejong made a lot of effort in order to
create Hanguel.
King Sejong made a lot of effort in order to
creating Hanguel.
> **정답** King Sejong made a lot of effort so as to create
Hanguel., King Sejong made a lot of effort in order to
create Hanguel.

---

**11.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Tom arrived early so as to take the front
seat.
They all packed their books to go home after
school.
I went back to the store to complain about the
product.
She was sorry in order to meet her friend after
so many years.
• complain 불평하다
> **정답** She was sorry in order to meet her friend after so
many years.

---

**12.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
The lady at the desk was happy to see him
back.
Tom was disappointed to see the empty box
of gift.
Tom took a cab so as to get there on time.
They all rushed to the station in order to not
miss the train.
> **정답** They all rushed to the station in order to not miss
the train.

---

**13.** 다음 중 문장에 쓰인 to부정사의 쓰임이 다른 하나를
고르시오.
The young kid was excited to find a new toy
on his bed.
Amy was surprised to see her friend in the
hospital.
I was glad to meet an old friend by accident.
Tom's mission was to look after his baby
brother for a day.
> **정답** Tom's mission was to look after his baby brother
for a day.

---

**14.** 다음 중 문장에 쓰인 to부정사의 쓰임이 다른 하나를
고르시오.
He has saved some money in order to buy a
new cell phone.
I exercise every day to lose weight.
She carefully read the test paper not to make
mistakes.
The teacher told me the way to learn English
fast.
> **정답** The teacher told me the way to learn English fast.

---

**15.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
She studies hard in order not to fail the
exams.
They were pleased in order to meet the
famous singer again.
I felt sorry to deliver this sad news to you.
He exercises after each meal not in order to
gain weight.
> **정답** She studies hard in order not to fail the exams., I felt
sorry to deliver this sad news to you.

---

**16.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
Amy carries her wallet all the time not to lose
it.
I felt happy seeing his arrival.
Mom picked some strawberries in the garden
to making salad.
Tom reads a newspaper to understand the
world.
> **정답** Tom reads a newspaper to understand the world.,
Amy carries her wallet all the time not to lose it.

---

**17.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐쓰시오.
I took a note not in order
to forget it.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** not in order → in order not

---

**18.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐쓰시오.
She was disappointed to knowing
her grade.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** knowing → know

---

**19.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐쓰시오.
Amy went to a hair salon to
changed her hairdo.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** changed → change

---

**20.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 곳을 모두 골라 고쳐
쓰시오. (2개)
Tom went out to buy some vegetables.
He prepared a shopping list
in order to not forget things
to buy . At the market, Tom met his
close friend. He was very pleased
meeting his friend by accident. They
shopped together. After a few minutes of
shopping, they decided to go home.
> **정답** to buy, in order not to, to buy, to meet, to go
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 064 to부정사의 부사적 용법 목적, 감정의 원인중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
웨이터는 접시를 떨어뜨리지 않기 위해 음식을 천천히 날
랐다.
힌트 (     ) carry, in order to, drop
The waiter  (     )  food slowly  (     )   (     )  
  (     )  the dishes.
정답 carried, in, order, not, to, drop

---

**02.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
Sally는 노래를 잘 부르기 위해 레슨을 받았다. [take a
lesson, sing]
Sally  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  well.
정답 took, a, lesson, to, sing

---

**03.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
소년은 경기를 이겨서 신이 났다. [excited, win, the
game]
The boy was  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 excited, to, win, the, game

---

**04.** 다음 글을 읽고 틀린 곳을 찾아 고쳐 쓰시오.
To study for exams is always tiring. But this time, I
had to study very hard because my parents
expected me [get] (     )  all A's. I really
wanted  (     ) to make (     )  them
happy. I did really well on exams, and they felt
pleased [finding] (     )  out my result.
• tiring 피곤한
정답 to get, to make, to find

---

**05.** 다음 글을 읽고 틀린 곳을 찾아 고쳐 쓰시오.
She visited a hospital [seeing] (     )  a doctor.
She had a flu and it really hurt. The doctor told her
[drink] (     )  plenty of water and go to bed
early. A few days later, she got better. The doctor
was happy [to treat] (     )  her.
• flu 독감
정답 to see, to drink, to treat

---

**06.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
힌트 (     ) ask, questions
A: Why did you go to see your homeroom teacher?
B: I went to see her  (     )   (     )   (     )  about the
English talking club.
정답 to, ask, questions

---

**07.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
힌트 (     ) use, vending machine
A: Why do you need some coins?
B: I need some coins in  (     )   (     )   (     )  the
  (     ) .
정답 order, to, use, vending, machine

---

**08.** 우리말에 맞게 단어를 배열하세요.
Amy는 다른 도시로 이사가게 되어서 슬펐다.
[sad] [moving] [to move]
[was] [Amy] [to another city.]
정답 Amy / was / sad / to move / to another city.

---

**09.** 다음 글을 주어진 단어들을 활용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
Chae-eun and Jiwoo had to stay at home all
afternoon because their mom told them
[finish] (     )  their homework. They were not
happy [do] (     )  homework. But mom
promised [bake] (     )  tasty cookies after
their homework. They did th]eir homework hard
[eat] (     )  the cookies.
정답 to finish, to do, to bake, to eat

---

**10.** 다음 글을 주어진 단어들을 이용하여 완성하시오.
I decided [write] (     )  a letter to my friend. I
needed a pen[ write] (     )  and paper
[write] (     ) . I brought them from my
mom's room. Then I began to think about what to
write. After finishing the letter, I went to the post
office [send] (     )  it.
정답 to write, to write with, to write on, to send

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 064: to부정사의 부사적 용법 목적, 감정의 원인 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 말을 고르시오.
Tom ran to the station ______________ Amy.
When they met each other, he felt pleased ___________________ her. to see to seeing see seeing
> 정답: to see

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
She goes to a store ______________ some bread.
But she was so sad ______________ the store closed. buying - seeing to buy - seeing to buy - to see buy - see
> 정답: to buy - to see

---

**03.** 다음 보기의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
<보기> Amy looked up the dictionary to find the meanings.
I'm planning to invite Tom to dinner.
Their task was to train new members for a week.
Jake had some gifts to hide from his friends.
Please leave the house early to arrive there in time.
> 정답: Please leave the house early to arrive there in time.

---

**04.** 다음 보기의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
<보기> Jake felt upset to get a bad grade for the science test.
To stay healthy, Amy regularly goes jogging.
We went to the park to take a walk.
I attended the meeting to discuss the school plan.
Mina was sorry to hear the bad news.
> 정답: Mina was sorry to hear the bad news.

---

**05.** 다음 보기의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
<보기> Tom is leaving for London to learn English.
The boy asked for some water to drink.
Amy went to the bookstore to buy notebooks and pens.
Jake wants to learn French.
They need to go to practice every day.
> 정답: Amy went to the bookstore to buy notebooks and pens.

---

**06.** 다음 보기의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
<보기> Tom was so glad to be on the team.
Amy and Jake are pleased to have a new kitten, Nabi.
I should buy a new notebook to write on.
His plan is to read ten history books a month.
They worked late last night to finish their project.
> 정답: Amy and Jake are pleased to have a new kitten,

---

**07.** 다음 <보기>와 같은 뜻의 문장을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
<보기> Amy surfed the Internet to find some information.
Amy surfed the Internet so as to find some information.
Amy surfed the Internet of finding some information.
Amy surfed the Internet by finding some information.
Amy surfed the Internet in order to find some information.
> 정답: Amy surfed the Internet so as to find some

---

**08.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
나의 할머니는 걷기 위해 지팡이가 필요하다.
My grandmother needs a cane to walk.
My grandmother needs a cane to walk with My grandmother needs a cane walking.
My grandmother needs a cane to walking.
> 정답: My grandmother needs a cane to walk with

---

**09.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그 학생은 자기 나라로 돌아 갈 수 있어서 기뻤다.
The student was pleased is able to go back to his country.
The student was pleased can go back to his country.
The student was pleased to be able to go back to his country.
The student was pleased to being able to go back to his country.
> 정답: The student was pleased to be able to go back to
